code: import React,{useState}from'react';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{API_URL}from'../config';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Register=()=>{const[username,setUsername]=useState('');const[password,setPassword]=useState('');const[msg,setMsg]=useState({type:'',text:''});const navigate=useNavigate();const handleSubmit=async e=>{e.preventDefault();setMsg({type:'',text:''});try{const res=await fetch(`${API_URL}/api/auth/register`,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({username,password})});const data=await res.json();if(res.ok){setMsg({type:'success',text:'账号创建成功！正在跳转登录...'});setTimeout(()=>navigate('/login'),1500);}else{setMsg({type:'error',text:data.msg==='User already exists'?'该用户名已被使用。':data.msg});}}catch(err){console.error(err);setMsg({type:'error',text:'服务器错误，请稍后再试。'});}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"form-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"\u521B\u5EFA\u4F60\u7684\u8D26\u53F7"}),msg.text&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{color:msg.type==='error'?'#e30000':'#0071e3',marginBottom:'15px',fontSize:'14px',fontWeight:500},children:msg.text}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:handleSubmit,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",placeholder:"Apple ID (\u7528\u6237\u540D)",value:username,onChange:e=>setUsername(e.target.value),required:true}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"password",placeholder:"\u5BC6\u7801",value:password,onChange:e=>setPassword(e.target.value),required:true}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",children:"\u6CE8\u518C\u8D26\u53F7"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["\u5DF2\u7ECF\u6709\u8D26\u53F7\u4E86\uFF1F ",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("a",{href:"/login",children:"\u5728\u6B64\u767B\u5F55\u3002"})]})]});};export default Register;
